requirements.summary: Issuers MUST emit compact form typ value
requirements.source_fragment: Issuers MUST emit this form

requirements.summary: Verifiers MUST accept full media type form
requirements.source_fragment: Verifiers MUST accept; normalized to compact form

requirements.summary: Full media type MUST be normalized to compact form
requirements.source_fragment: The full media type form `application/interaction-record+jwt` is accepted by verifiers and MUST be normalized to the compact form `interaction-record+jwt` before returning the decoded header.

requirements.summary: Issuers MUST NOT emit full media type form
requirements.source_fragment: Issuers MUST NOT emit the full media type form.

requirements.summary: Verifiers MUST enforce typ/peac_version coherence
requirements.source_fragment: Verifiers MUST enforce coherence between the JWS `typ` header and the `peac_version` payload claim

requirements.summary: Strict mode: typ MUST be present
requirements.source_fragment: **Strict** (default): `typ` MUST be present and MUST match `interaction-record+jwt`

requirements.summary: Strict mode: typ MUST match interaction-record+jwt
requirements.source_fragment: `typ` MUST be present and MUST match `interaction-record+jwt` (or its full media type form)

requirements.summary: Unknown top-level fields MUST be rejected
requirements.source_fragment: unknown top-level fields MUST be rejected

requirements.summary: peac_version is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `peac_version`     | `"0.2"` (literal)             | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: kind is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `kind`             | `"evidence"` or `"challenge"` | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: type is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `type`             | string                        | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: iss is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `iss`              | string                        | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: iat is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `iat`              | integer                       | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: jti is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `jti`              | string (1 to 256 chars)       | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: sub is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `sub`              | string                        | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: pillars is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `pillars`          | array of EvidencePillar       | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: actor is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `actor`            | ActorBinding                  | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: policy is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `policy`           | PolicyBlock                   | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: representation is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `representation`   | RepresentationFields          | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: occurred_at is OPTIONAL (evidence kind only)
requirements.source_fragment: `occurred_at`      | string (ISO 8601 / RFC 3339)  | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: purpose_declared is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `purpose_declared` | string                        | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: extensions is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `extensions`       | `Record<string, unknown>`     | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: Every Wire 0.2 receipt MUST include 6 required fields
requirements.source_fragment: Every Wire 0.2 receipt MUST include `peac_version`, `kind`, `type`, `iss`, `iat`, and `jti`.

requirements.summary: policy.digest is REQUIRED when policy block present
requirements.source_fragment: `digest`  | string       | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: policy.uri is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `uri`     | string (URL) | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: policy.version is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `version` | string       | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: policy.uri MUST start with https://
requirements.source_fragment: MUST start with `https://`

requirements.summary: Implementations MUST NOT auto-fetch policy.uri
requirements.source_fragment: Implementations MUST NOT trigger automatic fetch on encountering this URL (DD-55: no implicit network I/O).

requirements.summary: representation.content_hash is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `content_hash`   | string  | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: representation.content_type is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `content_type`   | string  | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: representation.content_length is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `content_length` | integer | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: actor.id is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `id`          | string       | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: actor.proof_type is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `proof_type`  | string       | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: actor.origin is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `origin`      | string (URL) | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: Implementations MUST preserve unrecognized open field values
requirements.source_fragment: Implementations MUST preserve unrecognized but well-formed values.

requirements.summary: Pillars array MUST be sorted ascending lexicographic
requirements.source_fragment: The `pillars` array MUST be sorted in ascending lexicographic order with no duplicates.

requirements.summary: occurred_at MUST NOT appear on challenge receipts
requirements.source_fragment: The `occurred_at` field MUST NOT appear on challenge receipts. Its presence produces `E_OCCURRED_AT_ON_CHALLENGE`.

requirements.summary: Challenges SHOULD include the challenge extension group
requirements.source_fragment: Challenges SHOULD include the challenge extension group (Section 13) with a `challenge_type` and an RFC 9457 `problem` body.

requirements.summary: A single type MAY appear with either kind
requirements.source_fragment: A single `type` MAY appear with either kind.

requirements.summary: type domain MUST contain at least one dot
requirements.source_fragment: MUST contain at least one dot

requirements.summary: type domain MUST match domain character pattern
requirements.source_fragment: MUST match /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9.-]*$/

requirements.summary: type segment MUST be non-empty
requirements.source_fragment: MUST be non-empty

requirements.summary: type segment MUST match segment character pattern
requirements.source_fragment: MUST match /^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9._-]*$/

requirements.summary: type domain MUST start with alphanumeric
requirements.source_fragment: MUST start with an alphanumeric character. MUST contain at least one dot

requirements.summary: type segment MUST start with alphanumeric
requirements.source_fragment: MUST start with an alphanumeric character. Underscores are permitted

requirements.summary: Reverse-DNS type values SHOULD be lowercase ASCII
requirements.source_fragment: Reverse-DNS `type` values SHOULD be lowercase ASCII.

requirements.summary: Verifiers MAY emit warning for uppercase reverse-DNS type
requirements.source_fragment: Verifiers MAY emit a warning when a reverse-DNS form `type` contains uppercase characters.

requirements.summary: Unknown pillar values MUST be rejected
requirements.source_fragment: Unknown values MUST be rejected.

requirements.summary: Pillars array MUST contain at least one element when present
requirements.source_fragment: When present, the array MUST contain at least one element.

requirements.summary: Pillar values MUST be in ascending lexicographic order
requirements.source_fragment: Values MUST be in ascending lexicographic order. Implementations MUST verify that each element is strictly greater than the preceding element.

requirements.summary: Duplicate pillar values MUST be rejected
requirements.source_fragment: Duplicate values MUST be rejected.

requirements.summary: Receipt MAY have type not corresponding to any single pillar
requirements.source_fragment: A receipt MAY have a type that does not directly correspond to any single pillar

requirements.summary: Receipt MAY have multiple pillars for a single type
requirements.source_fragment: MAY have multiple pillars for a single type

requirements.summary: iss scheme MUST be lowercase https
requirements.source_fragment: Scheme MUST be lowercase `https`.

requirements.summary: iss host MUST be lowercase ASCII
requirements.source_fragment: Host MUST be lowercase ASCII. Raw Unicode hostnames are rejected; punycode (`xn--` labels) is accepted.

requirements.summary: Default port 443 MUST NOT appear explicitly
requirements.source_fragment: The default port 443 MUST NOT appear explicitly (`:443` is rejected).

requirements.summary: iss MUST equal reconstructed origin exactly
requirements.source_fragment: iss MUST equal the reconstructed origin exactly

requirements.summary: DID method MUST be lowercase letters and digits only
requirements.source_fragment: Method: lowercase letters and digits only (`[a-z0-9]+`).

requirements.summary: DID method-specific-id MUST NOT contain path/query/fragment chars
requirements.source_fragment: Method-specific-id: non-empty, MUST NOT contain `/`, `?`, or `#`.

requirements.summary: All non-https/did schemes produce E_ISS_NOT_CANONICAL
requirements.source_fragment: All schemes other than `https` and `did` produce `E_ISS_NOT_CANONICAL`.

requirements.summary: Callers MUST always provide publicKey directly
requirements.source_fragment: callers MUST always provide the `publicKey: Uint8Array` parameter directly.

requirements.summary: occurred_at value MUST be valid ISO 8601/RFC 3339 datetime
requirements.source_fragment: The value MUST be a valid ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 datetime string with a timezone offset.

requirements.summary: alg MUST be EdDSA; all others rejected
requirements.source_fragment: Ed25519 only (RFC 8032); all other algorithms MUST be rejected

requirements.summary: kid is REQUIRED in JWS header
requirements.source_fragment: REQUIRED; identifies the signing key in the issuer JWKS

requirements.summary: Embedded key jwk MUST cause hard error
requirements.source_fragment: Presence of any of the following MUST cause a hard error:

requirements.summary: crit header MUST be rejected
requirements.source_fragment: `crit`                | `E_JWS_CRIT_REJECTED`

requirements.summary: b64:false MUST be rejected
requirements.source_fragment: `b64` (value `false`) | `E_JWS_B64_REJECTED`

requirements.summary: zip header MUST be rejected
requirements.source_fragment: `zip`                 | `E_JWS_ZIP_REJECTED`

requirements.summary: kid MUST be present and non-empty
requirements.source_fragment: `kid` MUST be present and non-empty. Absent or empty `kid` produces `E_JWS_MISSING_KID`.

requirements.summary: kid MUST NOT exceed 256 characters
requirements.source_fragment: `kid` MUST NOT exceed 256 characters (DoS safety).

requirements.summary: JWS compact serialization MUST NOT exceed 256 KB
requirements.source_fragment: The total JWS compact serialization MUST NOT exceed 262,144 bytes (256 KB).

requirements.summary: policyDigest option MUST match sha256:<64hex> format
requirements.source_fragment: The option value MUST match the format `sha256:<64 lowercase hex>` or it is rejected with `E_INVALID_FORMAT`.

requirements.summary: policy.uri MUST be https:// URL
requirements.source_fragment: The `policy.uri` field MUST be an `https://` URL.

requirements.summary: Implementations MUST NOT auto-fetch policy URI
requirements.source_fragment: Implementations MUST NOT auto-fetch the policy document based on this URI

requirements.summary: Extension keys MUST conform to domain/segment grammar
requirements.source_fragment: Extension keys MUST conform to the grammar: `<domain>/<segment>`.

requirements.summary: Extension key domain MUST have at least one dot
requirements.source_fragment: At least one dot (single-label domains are rejected).

requirements.summary: Extension key domain label MUST NOT exceed 63 chars
requirements.source_fragment: MUST NOT exceed 63 characters

requirements.summary: Extension key segment MUST be non-empty
requirements.source_fragment: The segment MUST be non-empty.

requirements.summary: Extension key segment MUST match lowercase pattern
requirements.source_fragment: Matches `[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*` (lowercase only).

requirements.summary: Commerce: payment_rail is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `payment_rail` | string               | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: Commerce: amount_minor is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `amount_minor` | string               | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: Commerce: currency is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `currency`     | string               | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: amount_minor MUST be base-10 integer string
requirements.source_fragment: The `amount_minor` field MUST be a base-10 integer string.

requirements.summary: Issuers SHOULD use distinct type for negative amounts
requirements.source_fragment: Issuers SHOULD use a distinct receipt `type`

requirements.summary: Access: resource is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `resource` | string                             | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: Access: action is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `action`   | string                             | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: Access: decision is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `decision` | `"allow"`, `"deny"`, or `"review"` | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: trace_id MUST match 32 lowercase hex chars
requirements.source_fragment: `trace_id` MUST match `/^[0-9a-f]{32}$/` (exactly 32 lowercase hex characters).

requirements.summary: span_id MUST match 16 lowercase hex chars
requirements.source_fragment: `span_id` MUST match `/^[0-9a-f]{16}$/` (exactly 16 lowercase hex characters).

requirements.summary: Unknown extension keys MUST be preserved
requirements.source_fragment: MUST be preserved (not silently dropped).

requirements.summary: Unknown extension keys MUST trigger warning
requirements.source_fragment: MUST trigger an `unknown_extension_preserved` warning at the protocol layer

requirements.summary: Unknown extension keys MUST NOT cause validation error
requirements.source_fragment: MUST NOT cause a validation error.

requirements.summary: Consent extension: consent_basis is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `consent_basis` string REQUIRED:

requirements.summary: Consent extension: consent_status is REQUIRED and closed enum
requirements.source_fragment: `consent_status` enum REQUIRED: granted, withdrawn, denied, expired.

requirements.summary: Consent extension: data_categories SHOULD be populated for GDPR evidence
requirements.source_fragment: `data_categories` string[] optional:

requirements.summary: Consent extension: retention_period uses ISO 8601 duration
requirements.source_fragment: `retention_period` Iso8601DurationSchema optional:

requirements.summary: Consent extension uses .strict(): unrecognized fields MUST be rejected
requirements.source_fragment: `.strict()` rejects unknown properties:

requirements.summary: Privacy extension: data_classification is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `data_classification` string REQUIRED:

requirements.summary: Privacy extension: processing_basis SHOULD be populated
requirements.source_fragment: `processing_basis` string optional:

requirements.summary: Privacy extension: retention_mode is closed enum (time_bound, indefinite, session_only)
requirements.source_fragment: `retention_mode` enum optional: time_bound, indefinite, session_only.

requirements.summary: Privacy extension: recipient_scope is closed enum (internal, processor, third_party, public)
requirements.source_fragment: `recipient_scope` enum optional: internal, processor, third_party, public.

requirements.summary: Privacy extension: anonymization_method SHOULD be populated when data is de-identified
requirements.source_fragment: `anonymization_method` string optional:

requirements.summary: Privacy extension: transfer_mechanism SHOULD be populated for cross-border transfers
requirements.source_fragment: `transfer_mechanism` string optional:

requirements.summary: Safety extension: review_status is REQUIRED and closed enum
requirements.source_fragment: `review_status` enum REQUIRED: reviewed, pending, flagged, not_applicable.

requirements.summary: Safety extension: risk_level is closed enum (unacceptable, high, limited, minimal)
requirements.source_fragment: `risk_level` enum optional: unacceptable, high, limited, minimal.

requirements.summary: Safety extension: assessment_method SHOULD describe the review methodology
requirements.source_fragment: `assessment_method` string optional:

requirements.summary: Safety extension: safety_measures array bounded by maxSafetyMeasuresCount
requirements.source_fragment: `safety_measures` string[] optional max 32 items:

requirements.summary: Safety extension: incident_ref SHOULD use digest or opaque identifier format
requirements.source_fragment: `incident_ref` string optional:

requirements.summary: Safety extension: model_ref identifies the AI model under review
requirements.source_fragment: `model_ref` string optional:

requirements.summary: Compliance extension: framework is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `framework` string REQUIRED: identifies the regulatory or standards framework evaluated.

requirements.summary: Compliance extension: compliance_status is REQUIRED and closed enum
requirements.source_fragment: `compliance_status` enum REQUIRED: compliant, non_compliant, partial, under_review, exempt.

requirements.summary: Compliance extension: audit_date uses structural date validation
requirements.source_fragment: `audit_date` ISO 8601 date optional: structural date validation (YYYY-MM-DD).

requirements.summary: Compliance extension: validity_period uses parser-grade duration validator
requirements.source_fragment: `validity_period` ISO 8601 duration optional: uses the parser-grade ISO 8601 duration validator.

requirements.summary: Compliance extension: evidence_ref uses typed SHA-256 digest validation
requirements.source_fragment: `evidence_ref` SHA-256 digest optional: uses `Sha256DigestSchema` for typed digest validation.

requirements.summary: Compliance extension: .strict() rejects unknown properties
requirements.source_fragment: `.strict()` rejects unknown properties: the compliance extension uses `.strict()` mode; unrecognized fields are rejected.

requirements.summary: Provenance extension: source_type is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `source_type` string REQUIRED: identifies the derivation type.

requirements.summary: Provenance extension: source_ref is an opaque reference
requirements.source_fragment: `source_ref` string optional: opaque source reference identifier.

requirements.summary: Provenance extension: custody_chain is an ordered array of strict entries
requirements.source_fragment: `custody_chain` CustodyEntry[] optional max 16 items: ordered chain of custody events.

requirements.summary: Provenance extension: slsa records SLSA-aligned metadata
requirements.source_fragment: `slsa` SlsaLevel optional: structured SLSA-aligned metadata.

requirements.summary: Provenance extension: .strict() rejects unknown properties on all nested schemas
requirements.source_fragment: `.strict()` rejects unknown properties: the provenance extension and all nested schemas use `.strict()` mode.

requirements.summary: Provenance extension: source_uri and build_provenance_uri are HTTPS locator hints only
requirements.source_fragment: `source_uri` and `build_provenance_uri` HTTPS URI hint optional: locator hints only; callers MUST NOT auto-fetch.

requirements.summary: Attribution extension: creator_ref is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `creator_ref` string REQUIRED: identifies the creator.

requirements.summary: Attribution extension: license_spdx uses parser-grade SPDX validator
requirements.source_fragment: `license_spdx` SPDX expression optional: uses the parser-grade SPDX license expression validator.

requirements.summary: Attribution extension: content_signal_source is closed enum
requirements.source_fragment: `content_signal_source` enum optional: tdmrep_json, content_signal_header, content_usage_header, robots_txt, custom.

requirements.summary: Attribution extension: content_digest uses typed SHA-256 digest validation
requirements.source_fragment: `content_digest` SHA-256 digest optional: uses `Sha256DigestSchema` for typed digest validation.

requirements.summary: Attribution extension: .strict() rejects unknown properties
requirements.source_fragment: `.strict()` rejects unknown properties: the attribution extension uses `.strict()` mode; unrecognized fields are rejected.

requirements.summary: Attribution extension: records observed metadata, not identity attestation (design guidance)
requirements.source_fragment: Not an identity attestation; records observed attribution metadata.

requirements.summary: Purpose extension: external_purposes is REQUIRED, min 1, max 32 items
requirements.source_fragment: `external_purposes` string[] REQUIRED min 1 max 32 items: external/legal/business purpose labels.

requirements.summary: Purpose extension: purpose_basis is open vocabulary
requirements.source_fragment: `purpose_basis` string optional: legal or policy basis for the declared purposes.

requirements.summary: Purpose extension: peac_purpose_mapping bridges to operational tokens
requirements.source_fragment: `peac_purpose_mapping` string optional: explicit bridge to a PEAC operational CanonicalPurpose token.

requirements.summary: Purpose extension: .strict() rejects unknown properties
requirements.source_fragment: `.strict()` rejects unknown properties: the purpose extension uses `.strict()` mode; unrecognized fields are rejected.

requirements.summary: Purpose extension: external_purposes and compatible_purposes enforce machine-safe token grammar and uniqueness
requirements.source_fragment: Each item MUST match the machine-safe token grammar and items MUST be unique.

requirements.summary: Purpose extension: peac_purpose_mapping validated against PURPOSE_TOKEN_REGEX
requirements.source_fragment: Validated against PURPOSE_TOKEN_REGEX.

requirements.summary: Challenge problem.status is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `status`   | integer      | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: Challenge problem.type is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `type`     | string (URL) | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: Challenge problem.title is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `title`    | string       | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: Challenge problem.detail is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `detail`   | string       | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: Challenge problem.instance is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `instance` | string       | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: Challenge resource is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `resource`     | string                    | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: Challenge action is OPTIONAL
requirements.source_fragment: `action`       | string                    | OPTIONAL

requirements.summary: Warning code is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `code`    | string | REQUIRED | Stable warning code identifier

requirements.summary: Warning message is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `message` | string | REQUIRED | Human-readable description

requirements.summary: Warning message MUST NOT be used for conformance testing
requirements.source_fragment: MUST NOT be used for conformance testing

requirements.summary: New warning codes MAY be added in future
requirements.source_fragment: New warning codes MAY be added in future versions.

requirements.summary: Existing warning codes MUST NOT be removed or renamed
requirements.source_fragment: Existing warning codes MUST NOT be removed or renamed.

requirements.summary: Consumers MUST tolerate unknown warning codes
requirements.source_fragment: Consumers MUST tolerate unknown warning codes gracefully.

requirements.summary: Warnings MUST be sorted by (pointer, code)
requirements.source_fragment: Warnings MUST be sorted by `(pointer ascending, code ascending)`.

requirements.summary: Conformance MUST assert on code and pointer only
requirements.source_fragment: Conformance implementations MUST assert on `code` and `pointer` fields only.

requirements.summary: message MUST NOT be used for conformance testing (14.5)
requirements.source_fragment: The `message` field is implementation-defined and MUST NOT be used for conformance testing.

requirements.summary: Implementations MUST verify typ/peac_version coherence after routing
requirements.source_fragment: implementations MUST verify coherence between the JWS `typ` and the payload `peac_version` field

requirements.summary: Wire 0.1 route payload MUST NOT contain peac_version 0.2
requirements.source_fragment: Wire 0.1 route: payload MUST NOT contain `peac_version: "0.2"`.

requirements.summary: Wire 0.2 route payload MUST contain peac_version 0.2
requirements.source_fragment: Wire 0.2 route: payload MUST contain `peac_version: "0.2"`.

requirements.summary: Strict: JWS typ MUST be present
requirements.source_fragment: JWS `typ` MUST be present.

requirements.summary: Strict: typ MUST be a recognized value
requirements.source_fragment: `typ` MUST be a recognized value

requirements.summary: Production deployments SHOULD use strict mode
requirements.source_fragment: Production deployments SHOULD use strict mode.

requirements.summary: Issuers MUST emit compact form typ (18.3)
requirements.source_fragment: Compact form: `interaction-record+jwt` (canonical; issuers MUST emit this form)

requirements.summary: Verifiers MUST accept media-type form (18.3)
requirements.source_fragment: Media-type form: `application/interaction-record+jwt` (verifiers MUST accept)

requirements.summary: MUST NOT perform content-type parameter parsing
requirements.source_fragment: Implementations MUST NOT perform content-type parameter parsing

requirements.summary: typ and peac_version MUST agree (18.4)
requirements.source_fragment: The `typ` header and `peac_version` payload claim MUST agree.

requirements.summary: Production SHOULD use strict mode (18.5)
requirements.source_fragment: Production deployments SHOULD use strict mode, which rejects missing `typ`.

requirements.summary: Future implementations MAY relax unknown minor version
requirements.source_fragment: Future implementations MAY relax this to process unknown minor versions with a warning

requirements.summary: Multiple package versions MAY implement same wire version
requirements.source_fragment: Multiple package versions MAY implement the same wire format version.

requirements.summary: Steps MUST be performed in specified order
requirements.source_fragment: Implementations MUST perform steps in the order specified.

requirements.summary: Hard error MUST terminate validation immediately
requirements.source_fragment: A step that produces a hard error MUST terminate validation immediately

requirements.summary: Verifier MUST NOT continue after hard error
requirements.source_fragment: the verifier MUST NOT continue to subsequent steps.

requirements.summary: jws input is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `jws`          | string     | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: publicKey input is REQUIRED
requirements.source_fragment: `publicKey`    | Uint8Array | REQUIRED

requirements.summary: Step 1: alg MUST be EdDSA
requirements.source_fragment: The `alg` header parameter MUST be `EdDSA`.

requirements.summary: Step 3: kernel constraints fail-closed
requirements.source_fragment: Kernel constraints are structural limits (field lengths, array sizes) enforced before schema parsing. Failure is fail-closed: return `E_CONSTRAINT_VIOLATION`.

requirements.summary: Step 9: iat MUST NOT exceed now + maxClockSkew
requirements.source_fragment: `iat` MUST NOT exceed `now + maxClockSkew`.

requirements.summary: Step 10a: jti is REQUIRED (enforced by schema)
requirements.source_fragment: The `jti` claim is REQUIRED (enforced by schema validation in Step 4).

requirements.summary: Step 10b: Verifiers with replay cache SHOULD reject duplicates
requirements.source_fragment: Verifiers that maintain a replay cache SHOULD reject duplicate `jti`

requirements.summary: Step 10b: Verifiers without cache MAY skip replay check
requirements.source_fragment: Verifiers without a replay cache MAY skip this step

requirements.summary: HTTP mapping SHOULD use 400 Bad Request
requirements.source_fragment: implementations SHOULD map these to HTTP 400 Bad Request

requirements.summary: jti claim is REQUIRED on all Wire 0.2 receipts
requirements.source_fragment: The `jti` claim is REQUIRED on all Wire 0.2 receipts.

requirements.summary: Issuers MUST ensure jti uniqueness
requirements.source_fragment: Issuers MUST ensure `jti` uniqueness across all receipts they produce.

requirements.summary: jti MUST be 1 to 256 characters
requirements.source_fragment: The `jti` value MUST be a non-empty string of 1 to 256 characters.

requirements.summary: Implementations SHOULD use 128+ bits of entropy for jti
requirements.source_fragment: Implementations SHOULD use at least 128 bits of entropy

requirements.summary: Verifiers with cache SHOULD reject duplicate jti per iss
requirements.source_fragment: Verifiers that maintain a replay cache SHOULD reject duplicate `jti` from the same `iss`

requirements.summary: Verifiers without cache MAY skip replay detection
requirements.source_fragment: Verifiers without a replay cache (stateless deployments, edge functions, serverless) MAY skip replay detection.

requirements.summary: Replay caches SHOULD use iat-based expiry
requirements.source_fragment: Use `iat`-based expiry.

requirements.summary: RECOMMENDED cache window is 2x tolerance (600s)
requirements.source_fragment: A RECOMMENDED window is 2x `OCCURRED_AT_TOLERANCE_SECONDS` (600 seconds).

requirements.summary: Caches SHOULD be scoped per iss
requirements.source_fragment: Caches SHOULD be scoped per `iss`

requirements.summary: Implementations MAY use probabilistic structures
requirements.source_fragment: Implementations MAY use bloom filters or probabilistic data structures

requirements.summary: aud claim is OPTIONAL in Wire 0.2
requirements.source_fragment: The `aud` claim is OPTIONAL in Wire 0.2.

requirements.summary: Verifiers checking aud SHOULD reject unaddressed receipts
requirements.source_fragment: Verifiers that check `aud` SHOULD reject receipts not addressed to them.

requirements.summary: Each receipt in bundle MUST have unique jti
requirements.source_fragment: Each receipt in an evidence bundle MUST have a unique `jti`.
